name: Ekata
description: Ekata, a Mastercard company, offers identity data APIs including Pro Insight, Identity Check and Transaction Risk. Developers use it to score signups, checkout sessions and wire transfers against email, phone, name and address signals for s

seo.title: Ekata — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Ekata: Ekata, a Mastercard company, offers identity data APIs including Pro Insight, Identity Check and Transaction Risk. Developers use it to score signups, ch

when_to_use: Identity signal scoring for checkout fraud risk assessment
Email and phone risk API for signup abuse prevention
Wire transfer risk scoring via Ekata Transaction Risk API
Address verification enrichment for CNP fraud mitigation
Account opening risk scoring for banking onboarding flows

pros: Global coverage via Mastercard data network
Strong email, phone and address signals
Widely trusted by PSPs and marketplaces
cons: Per-call pricing stacks up at scale
Raw signals, you build the scoring
Less granular on device and behavioral signals
Procurement via Mastercard can be slow
review.verdict: Reliable identity data backbone for custom risk models, but not a turnkey fraud decision engine.
review.best_for: Risk teams building their own scoring who need global email, phone and address intelligence.
review.not_for: Teams wanting out-of-box approve/decline decisions without engineering work.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
